channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Curious about DeepSeek but worried about privacy? These apps let you use an LLM without the internet
item.description: Most of us are used to using internet chatbots like ChatGPT and DeepSeek in one of two ways: via a web browser or via their dedicated smartphone apps. There are two drawbacks to this. First, their use requires an internet connection.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Next-gen nuclear startup plans 30 reactors to fuel Texas data centers
item.description: Last Energy, a nuclear upstart backed by an Elon Musk-linked venture capital fund, says it plans to construct 30 microreactors on a site in Texas to supply electricity to data centers across the state.
item.dc:creator: Alex Pasternack, Fast Company

item.title: Chip Ganassi Racing partners with OpenAI in first motorsports venture for AI company
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Chip Ganassi Racing on Friday said it has partnered on a strategic research collaboration with OpenAI — a deal that makes the two-time reigning IndyCar championship winning team the first to bring in a partner from the artificial intelligence field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Microsoft shutting down Skype in May
item.description: Microsoft is closing down Skype, the video-calling service it bought for $8.5 billion in 2011, which had helped spark a transformation in how people communicate online.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Federal Executive Forum Artificial Intelligence Strategies in Government Progress and Best Practices 2025
item.description: How are agencies refining their AI strategy? The post Federal Executive Forum Artificial Intelligence Strategies in Government Progress and Best Practices 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: What is an AI server? Why artificial intelligence needs specialized systems
item.description: AI servers are advanced computing systems designed to handle complex, resource-intensive AI workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Do more with Python’s new built-in async programming library
item.description: There’s lots to do in this edition of the Python Report: Do more than one thing with Python’s async. Do the math faster in Python with NumPy. Do Python in Visual Studio Code, and do it the right way with our get-started guide.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: One Tech Tip: Getting a lot of unwanted phone calls? Here are ways to stop them
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Unwanted phone calls are out of control. Whether it's a robocall trying to sell you something or spam calls from scammers trying to rip you off, it's enough to make you want to stop answering your phone.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Overcoming data compliance and security challenges in the age of AI
item.description: We are in the era of artificial intelligence (AI), and businesses are unlocking unprecedented opportunities for growth and efficiency.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: NFL NextGen Stats team unveils new tool to help fans better understand combine results
item.description: The NFL scouting combine provides a blizzard of data with hundreds of prospects running through various drills ranging from the 40-yard dash to the vertical jump to a short shuttle.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Nvidia sales surge in the fourth quarter on demand for AI chips
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Nvidia on Wednesday reported a surge in fourth-quarter profit and sales as demand for its specialized Blackwell chips, which power artificial intelligence systems, continued to grow, sending the company's stock higher after hours. For the three months that ended Jan.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Reform doesn’t come easily to the agency that guards the nuclear weapons stockpile
item.description: The National Nuclear Security Administration is among the agencies trying to reform themselves as it requires certain best practices to be in place. The post Reform doesn’t come easily to the agency that guards the nuclear weapons stockpile first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: 11 rules for writing better code
item.description: You can’t develop software and manage software projects for 30 years and not learn a thing or two or twelve about writing good code. Here are a near-dozen nuggets of coding wisdom I picked up along the way.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Red Hat OpenShift improves virtualization support
item.description: Red Hat OpenShift 4.18, the latest version of the company’s Kubernetes-powered application platform, has arrived, with enhancements designed to simplify management of virtual machines and containers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI, automation spur efforts to upskill network pros
item.description: Networking skills are evolving to keep pace with broader technology trends, and network pros need to proactively develop new competencies in areas such as AI and automation to stay relevant.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: I’m a tech expert. These are the 5 time-saving tech tips I tell everyone
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson presents five secret shortcuts: Adjust sound/vibration, share YouTube moments, fix tabs and tweak brightness.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alibaba to invest $52 billion in AI and cloud over three years
item.description: Alibaba is planning to invest 380 billion yuan ($52 billion) in artificial intelligence and cloud computing over the next three years, its biggest commitment yet to AI-driven infrastructure. That’s more than its total spending on AI and cloud computing over the past decade, it said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: VA EHR office shrinks headcount under Trump’s federal workforce policies
item.description: VA officials are working on an updated EHR deployment schedule beyond the Michigan go-lives in mid-2026. The post VA EHR office shrinks headcount under Trump’s federal workforce policies first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: Protecting US supply chains from foreign influence
item.description: With the new Trump administration likely to place an even greater focus on reducing reliance on China, this trend is expected to accelerate. The post Protecting US supply chains from foreign influence first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Top Apple exec concedes he had doubts about app store fees imposed on alternative payment options
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Longtime Apple executive Phil Schiller on Monday conceded he initially opposed fees that the iPhone maker charges for in app-transactions processed outside its own payment system because he feared violating a court-ordered mandate designed to create more competition.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Elizabeth Holmes fails to overturn her Theranos fraud conviction
item.description: The three-judge panel in San Francisco also upheld the fraud conviction of Holmes’ former business partner and lover Ramesh “Sunny” Balwani.
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Federal News Network’s DoD Modernization Exchange 2025
item.description: Hear from top Defense and industry leaders on the latest tech, strategy and innovation shaping DoD modernization The post Federal News Network’s DoD Modernization Exchange 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Apple announces $500 billion investment in US amid tariff threats that could affect the iPhone
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Apple announced Monday that it plans to invest more than $500 billion in the United States over the next four years, including plans to hire 20,000 people and build a new server factory in Texas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Massive airship could shake up cargo transport
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says this enormous airship revolutionizes cargo transport by flying to remote areas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
